working_on.summary: Completed: Zalo OA full integration, Facebook OAuth refactor (replaced manual token), multi-page selection, AES-256-GCM token encryption, HMAC OAuth state, rate limiting, token revocation on disconnect. All TSC + ESLint clean. Facebook connection tested and working. Zalo pending user Zalo account verification.

pending_tasks: Zalo OA: user cần xác thực tài khoản Zalo trước khi tạo app trên developers.zalo.me
recent_changes: Zalo OA full integration: OAuth, adapter, webhook, token refresh, DB schema (ZALO enum)
Facebook OAuth refactor: replaced manual token with OAuth flow, multi-page selection
crypto.util.ts: AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt + HMAC-SHA256 signed state
Rate limiting: @Throttle(5/min) on all OAuth endpoints + callbacks
Token revocation: FB disconnect unsubscribes webhook + clears tokens, Zalo clears tokens
Fixed: pending page session bug (fbPendingSession not cleared on onRefresh causing remount error)
Removed deprecated FB_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN, added FB_APP_ID + APP_BASE_URL to .env

uncommitted_summary.summary: Major channel integration work: Zalo OA + Facebook OAuth refactor + security hardening. ~15 files changed/added. All validated (TSC + ESLint clean). Needs commit.
